name: Broccoli-Cheddar Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 can condensed cheddar cheese soup (11 oz)
1/2 cup frozen, loose-pack hash brown potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, stir together milk and soup. Cook over medium heat until bubbly.
2. Remove from the heat. Stir in broccoli, hash browns, corn, and pimiento; cool.
3. Pour mixture into a 1-quart freezer container. Seal, label, and freeze.
To serve:
1. Transfer frozen mixture to a large saucepan. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 40-45 minutes or until heated through, stirring occasionally.
2. Makes 6 servings.
